name: List catalog items (paginated)

targetRestContract.notes: MinimalApi endpoint already HTTP-exposed. Default pageSize=0 returns all matching items (take=int.MaxValue); Spring Boot target should preserve this behaviour. pageCount = ceil(totalItems/pageSize), or 1 (items present) / 0 (empty) when pageSize=0.

notes: A deliberate Task.Delay(1000) exists at the top of HandleAsync — do NOT carry this over to the Java target.
AutoMapper maps CatalogItem entity to CatalogItemDto; the Java port should use a manual mapper or MapStruct.

BlazorAdmin CatalogItemService calls GET catalog-items?PageSize=10 and GET catalog-items (no params) — both map to this endpoint. No web-side Razor Page calls this endpoint; the Razor homepage uses the in-process ICatalogViewModelService instead.
